messages.name: fs.read
messages.content: Define the checks that decide whether a model is better in the real runtime. Fixed eval verifies artifacts, data integrity, dedup quality, and split shape. It writes `data/train/runs/fixed-eval.json`. It must fail when the corpus remains mostly repeated boilerplate. Behavioral eval runs against the exported model with raw generation only. It writes `data/train/runs/behavioral-eval.json`.
